hooks.command: bash -c 'read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q "git push origin"; then ref=$(echo "$cmd" | grep -oP "git push origin \K\S+" | head -1); [ -n "$ref" ] && git push github $ref 2>/dev/null; fi'

bash -c 'read -r i; f=$(echo "$i" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q "\.go$" && (CG=$(which codegraph 2>/dev/null || echo $HOME/.local/codegraph/bin/codegraph); [ -x "$CG" ] && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && "$CG" sync . 2>/dev/null) || true'
